[[General/Legends|General]] '''Vernan''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chief of Intelligence/Legends|Chief of Intelligence]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[General/Legends|General]] Vernan was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chief of Intelligence/Legends|Chief of Intelligence]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Vernan acted on information gathered to accurately predict that the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet|Oplovis Fleet]] would attempt to put down a revolt on [[Mantooine/Legends|Mantooine]] in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]]. This report was based on information acquired by a intelligence agent named [[Troomis]] that was analyzed by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ioth]] of the [[Analysis (Alliance Intelligence)|Analysis]] branch. Further analysis by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zgorth'sth]] from [[Intentions]] division provided the first inkling that Oplovis Fleet was about to act, and a surveillance [[Droid/Legends|droid]] confirmed that the fleet was on the move. Vernan sent [[Fleet Intelligence (Alliance to Restore the Republic)|Fleet Intelligence]] word, and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] led a battle line of three Alliance [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] into the [[Generis system/Legends|Generis system]], [[Battle of the Generis system|ambushing]] and defeating the Oplovis fleet.<ref name="RASB" />

Later during the war, Vernan expressed concern that [[Jin]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Dutra Zeneta]] had a [[Death/Legends|death]] wish after requesting assignment as a [[Foster Agent]] so soon after completing his twentieth mission with Alliance Intelligence. Zeneta was a survivor of the [[Wellte-ir Massacre]], but he convinced [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] to approve his request.<ref name="J10">{{JournalCite|10|Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)}}</ref> In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], General Vernan was killed in action.<ref name="AIR" />
